CREATE TABLE validation_cycles (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        cycle_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
        scenario_id INTEGER,
        scenario_name TEXT NOT NULL,
        voice_input TEXT NOT NULL,
        matched_command TEXT,
        match_score REAL DEFAULT 0,
        expected_command TEXT,
        result TEXT NOT NULL,
        details TEXT DEFAULT '',
        execution_time_ms REAL DEFAULT 0,
        timestamp REAL DEFAULT 0
    )
CREATE TABLE sqlite_sequence(name,seq)

CREATE TABLE commands (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
            category TEXT NOT NULL,
            description TEXT NOT NULL,
            triggers TEXT NOT NULL,
            action_type TEXT NOT NULL,
            action TEXT NOT NULL,
            params TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
            confirm INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            created_at REAL DEFAULT 0,
            usage_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            last_used REAL DEFAULT 0,
            success_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            fail_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0
        )

CREATE TABLE skills (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
            description TEXT NOT NULL,
            triggers TEXT NOT NULL,
            steps TEXT NOT NULL,
            category TEXT DEFAULT 'custom',
            created_at REAL DEFAULT 0,
            usage_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            last_used REAL DEFAULT 0,
            success_rate REAL DEFAULT 1.0,
            confirm INTEGER DEFAULT 0
        )

CREATE TABLE voice_corrections (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            wrong TEXT NOT NULL,
            correct TEXT NOT NULL,
            category TEXT DEFAULT 'phonetic',
            hit_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0
        )

CREATE TABLE scenarios (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
            description TEXT NOT NULL,
            category TEXT NOT NULL,
            voice_input TEXT NOT NULL,
            expected_commands TEXT NOT NULL,
            expected_result TEXT NOT NULL,
            difficulty TEXT DEFAULT 'normal',
            created_at REAL DEFAULT 0,
            validated INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            validation_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            last_validated REAL DEFAULT 0,
            success_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            fail_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0
        )

CREATE TABLE action_history (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            action TEXT NOT NULL,
            result TEXT DEFAULT '',
            success INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
            source TEXT DEFAULT 'voice',
            timestamp REAL DEFAULT 0
        )

CREATE TABLE benchmark_runs (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
    duration_ms INTEGER,
    total_levels INTEGER,
    total_nodes INTEGER,
    best_node TEXT,
    best_score REAL,
    worst_node TEXT,
    worst_score REAL,
    notes TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE benchmark_results (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    run_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    level INTEGER NOT NULL,
    level_category TEXT,
    node TEXT NOT NULL,
    model TEXT,
    status TEXT,
    latency_ms INTEGER,
    output_len INTEGER,
    score INTEGER,
    keyword_hits TEXT,
    quality TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (run_id) REFERENCES benchmark_runs(id)
)

CREATE TABLE consensus_log (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
    query TEXT NOT NULL,
    nodes_queried TEXT,
    nodes_responded TEXT,
    verdict TEXT,
    confidence REAL,
    details TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE node_metrics (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
    node TEXT NOT NULL,
    model TEXT,
    avg_score REAL,
    avg_latency_ms INTEGER,
    failures INTEGER,
    profile TEXT,
    weight REAL
)
CREATE TABLE sqlite_stat1(tbl,idx,stat)

CREATE TABLE scheduler_jobs (job_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, interval_s INTEGER, action TEXT, params TEXT, enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 1, one_shot INTEGER DEFAULT 0, last_run REAL DEFAULT 0.0, run_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, last_result TEXT DEFAULT '', last_error TEXT DEFAULT '', created_at REAL DEFAULT (unixepoch()))

CREATE TABLE collab_tasks (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    task_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    category TEXT DEFAULT 'general',
    priority TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
    assigned_to TEXT DEFAULT 'perplexity',
    created_by TEXT DEFAULT 'claude_code',
    actions TEXT,
    expected_output TEXT,
    result TEXT,
    created_at REAL,
    started_at REAL,
    completed_at REAL
)

CREATE TABLE voice_commands (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    description TEXT,
    triggers TEXT NOT NULL,
    action_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    action TEXT NOT NULL,
    params TEXT,
    confirm INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    enabled INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
    usage_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    last_used REAL,
    created_at REAL,
    updated_at REAL
)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_pipeline (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    step_order INTEGER NOT NULL,
    action TEXT NOT NULL,
    selector TEXT,
    value TEXT,
    wait_seconds REAL DEFAULT 0,
    description TEXT,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_posts (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    post_url TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'draft',
    source TEXT DEFAULT 'manual',
    hashtags TEXT,
    impressions INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    published_at TIMESTAMP
)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_config (
    key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    value TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_actions (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        action_type TEXT NOT NULL,
        target TEXT,
        content TEXT,
        timestamp INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s','now')),
        status TEXT DEFAULT 'done'
    )

CREATE TABLE linkedin_scheduled_posts (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    theme TEXT DEFAULT '',
    generated_by TEXT DEFAULT 'manual',
    cluster_validated INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    validation_scores TEXT DEFAULT '{}',
    scheduled_at TEXT,
    published_at TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'draft',
    created_at INTEGER DEFAULT (strftime('%s','now'))
)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_daily_routine (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    routine_date TEXT NOT NULL,
    scroll_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    likes_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    comments_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    replies_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    notif_checked INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    posts_published INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    started_at INTEGER,
    finished_at INTEGER,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending'
)

CREATE TABLE chat_history (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                session_id TEXT,
                role TEXT NOT NULL,
                content TEXT NOT NULL,
                agent TEXT,
                model TEXT,
                latency_ms REAL DEFAULT 0,
                tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                timestamp REAL NOT NULL
            )

CREATE TABLE system_config (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    ts REAL NOT NULL,
    key TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    value TEXT NOT NULL
)
